docs.title: Brasidata
docs.text:
Data governance for construction, with a solid foundation for AI.

Brasidata helps construction companies organize, standardize, and govern data to improve decisions, reduce rework, and accelerate AI initiatives with confidence.

Talk to Brasidata | Explore services

docs.title: Turn fragmented data into a competitive advantage
docs.text:
Data governance is not bureaucracy. It enables operational predictability, reliable KPIs, and AI projects that deliver real outcomes on site, in the office, and at the executive level.

What you get with Brasidata - Less inconsistency across teams and systems - More confidence in schedule, cost, and productivity metrics - A technical foundation for scalable analytics and AI

docs.title: Solutions for the main data challenges in construction
docs.text:
1. Siloed information - We connect planning, site execution, procurement, finance, and operations into a shared view.

2. Low data quality - We define quality rules, ownership, and continuous correction workflows.

3. No shared definitions - We build a business glossary, canonical entities, and standards across the organization.

4. AI without foundations - We establish governance, lineage, and controls so AI can be trusted.

Assess my data maturity

docs.text:
Service What’s included Expected outcome Data Governance Assessment Review of quality, ownership, policies, and risks Clear map of gaps and priorities Strategy & Roadmap Phased execution plan with targets and ownership Structured, feasible evolution Data & Metadata Modeling Business entities, taxonomy, glossary, and lineage Shared language and traceability Data Quality Framework Rules, monitoring, triage workflows, and KPIs More reliable day-to-day data AI Readiness Program Use-case prioritization, requirements, and AI guardrails Higher odds of AI success Team Enablement Training for leaders, business teams, and data roles Sustainable governance operations

Request a proposal

docs.title: AI readiness starts with governance
docs.text:
Before you scale AI, your organization should be able to say “yes” to these points:

  • Critical data domains have clear owners
  • Quality rules are defined and enforced
  • Metadata and lineage are documented
  • Access, security, and compliance are explicit
  • AI use cases are prioritized by business value

If any of these are not mature yet, Brasidata builds a practical plan to close the gap.

Get my AI readiness assessment

docs.title: Frequently asked questions
docs.text:
What is data governance in construction? It is the set of roles, policies, standards, and controls that keep data consistent, secure, and useful for operations, management, and innovation.

Do we need to replace all systems to start? No. Brasidata starts from your current reality and evolves in phases, focused on practical impact.

How soon do results show up? Typically within the first weeks you gain visibility and alignment. Structural results follow as the roadmap phases are executed.

Does governance really help AI projects? Yes. Without quality, context, and traceability, AI models lose accuracy and trust.

Do you train internal teams? Yes. Enablement is part of the work to ensure continuity and scale.

docs.title: About Brasidata
docs.text:
Brasidata is a specialized consultancy focused on data governance for the construction sector. We work at the intersection of strategy, operations, and technology to turn fragmented data into a high-value asset for decisions and AI.

How we operate - Simplicity with a strong focus on outcomes - Practical implementation, not excessive theory - Step-by-step evolution with clear indicators

docs.title: AI Readiness
docs.text: AI only works when the underlying data is reliable, well-defined, and governed. Brasidata helps construction teams build the foundation to deploy AI with confidence.

docs.title: AI Readiness Checklist
docs.text:
• Critical domains are identified (projects, costs, schedule, resources, procurement, assets)
  • Data owners and accountability are defined
  • Quality baselines exist and are monitored
  • Metadata and lineage are documented
  • Access, security, and compliance rules are explicit
  • AI use cases are prioritized by business value and feasibility

docs.title: What Brasidata Delivers
docs.text:
• Practical gap analysis and prioritized actions
  • Governance guardrails for AI pilots
  • Domain model and definitions to reduce ambiguity
  • A phased plan to scale analytics and AI across projects

Get an AI readiness assessment

docs.title: What is data governance in construction?
docs.text: It is the set of roles, standards, policies, and controls that keep project and operational data consistent, secure, and usable across teams and systems.

docs.title: Do we need to replace our systems to start?
docs.text: No. Governance can start with your current toolset and evolve in phases. The goal is to reduce friction and improve trust without forcing an immediate platform overhaul.

docs.title: How fast do we see results?
docs.text: Initial visibility and alignment typically improve early. Structural results come as the roadmap phases are executed and governance becomes part of the operating rhythm.

docs.title: Does governance really improve AI outcomes?
docs.text: Yes. AI models depend on reliable data, clear definitions, and traceability. Governance reduces ambiguity, improves quality, and increases trust in outputs.

docs.title: Do you train internal teams?
docs.text:
Yes. Enablement is part of making governance sustainable, including workshops, role definition, and operating routines.

Contact Brasidata

docs.title: Services
docs.text: Choose targeted support or a phased program. Brasidata focuses on practical governance that improves day-to-day decisions and enables AI safely.

docs.title: Data Governance Assessment
docs.text:
• Current-state maturity scoring
  • Data quality and process review
  • Stakeholder mapping and ownership gaps

Deliverable: assessment report with prioritized recommendations.

docs.title: Strategy & Roadmap
docs.text:
• Governance operating model (roles, councils, workflows)
  • Policy and standard definition
  • Phased roadmap aligned to business value

Deliverable: executable roadmap with milestones and owners.

docs.title: Data & Metadata Modeling
docs.text:
• Canonical domains and entities for construction data
  • Business glossary and metric definitions
  • Lineage and metadata structure

Deliverable: reference data model + governance artifacts.

docs.title: Data Quality Framework
docs.text:
• Quality rules and controls by domain
  • Monitoring metrics and alerts
  • Issue triage and resolution workflow

Deliverable: quality rule catalog + operational dashboard approach.

docs.title: AI Readiness Program
docs.text:
• Use-case identification and prioritization
  • Data requirements and guardrails
  • Pilot support with governance-by-design

Deliverable: AI readiness plan and pilot blueprint.

Request a proposal

docs.title: Solutions
docs.text: Brasidata delivers data governance solutions designed for the realities of construction projects: multiple stakeholders, changing schedules, mixed tooling, and high cost of rework.

docs.title: Siloed project information
docs.text:
• Align data across planning, site execution, procurement, finance, and operations
  • Reduce manual reconciliation and inconsistent reporting

docs.title: Low data quality
docs.text:
• Establish rules, monitoring, and issue workflows
  • Improve trust in KPIs used for cost, schedule, and productivity decisions

docs.title: No shared definitions
docs.text:
• Define a business glossary and canonical metrics
  • Standardize domains (projects, activities, resources, contracts, suppliers, assets)

docs.title: AI without foundations
docs.text:
• Build governance, metadata, and lineage to support reliable AI
  • Reduce model risk caused by inconsistent or undocumented data

docs.title: Typical Outcomes
docs.text:
• One “single source of truth” view for executive reporting
  • Faster reporting cycles with fewer disputes between areas
  • Better readiness for analytics and AI across the portfolio
